response.justification: Bogdan has a genuine high-throughput engineering background — his Sociomantic work at millions of requests per second is credible — and his language breadth covers the required stack. However, the role is specifically Principal-level with a mandate to own experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, telemetry foundations, and statistical bias detection. None of these appear anywhere in the resume. His trajectory runs through full-stack product engineering, GIS platforms, and direct-mail pricing, with no apparent exposure to growth engineering, experiment assignment systems, or measurement infrastructure. The seniority gap is also material: Principal/IC6 requires demonstrated cross-org architectural influence and platform ownership that is not evidenced here.
strengths: Proven high-throughput distributed systems work at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second, showing real scale experience
Broad language coverage across JavaScript/TypeScript, C++, Java, and C# aligns with the required tech stack
Long IC career with staff-level titles and open-source platform ownership demonstrating sustained individual contribution
concerns: Zero experimentation platform experience: no A/B testing, feature flagging, rollout automation, or experiment assignment systems appear anywhere in the resume
No telemetry, instrumentation, or metrics infrastructure work evident; the JD requires this as a foundational capability
No data analysis, statistical methods, or growth engineering background — the role requires bias detection and experimental quality, which are entirely absent

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or metrics systems experience
